/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/turtlebot_description_test_urdf.dir/test/test_urdf.cpp.o  -o /home/pc/catkin_ws_turtlebot/devel/lib/turtlebot_description/turtlebot_description_test_urdf   -L/home/pc/catkin_ws_turtlebot/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pc/catkin_ws_turtlebot/build/gtest:/home/pc/catkin_ws_turtlebot/build/gtest/lib ../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
